reason_not_executed: The private ESSO repository was readable through the GitHub connector but was not materialized as an executable local checkout. No ESSO result, mutant kill, or replayability claim is made.

state: four nonnegative numeric limbs per dimension
properties: every tree equals the exact ordered-manifest numeric fold
every tree preserves leaf occurrence coverage exactly
different units and kinds never merge
aggregate identity cannot create external accepted-journal authority

mutants.change: replace monotone limbs with bounded signed checked net
drop authority debit and credit columns
delete a material row when credit equals debit
replace ordered occurrence concatenation with set union
replace a leaf authority root under equal totals
replace a transformation root under equal totals
project supplied rows without matching the accepted journal root
accept a limb above leaf_count times leaf maximum
retry an overflow under a wider caller-selected profile
admit an external transition from the internal empty fold
use proof-field modular addition without U256 carry checks

promotion_rule: This campaign remains non-evidence until every required replay-receipt field and artifact is committed and independently checked.
